channel.title: Money on Expat Japan
channel.description: Recent content in Money on Expat Japan

item.title: Credit Card Guide for Foreigners in Japan (2025)
item.description: Can foreigners get a credit card in Japan? Yes — here's which cards accept foreigners, what documents you need, and the best cards to apply for.

item.title: How to File Taxes in Japan as a Foreigner (2025 Guide)
item.description: Do foreigners need to file taxes in Japan? Yes — here's a simple guide to Japanese income tax, who needs to file, and how to do it.

item.title: How to Save Money Living in Japan: Tips for Foreigners
item.description: Practical tips for saving money as a foreigner in Japan. How to cut costs on food, phone bills, transport, and everyday expenses without sacrificing quality of life.

item.title: Best Money Transfer Apps from Japan (Cheap & Fast) 2025
item.description: The cheapest and fastest ways to send money from Japan to the Philippines, Vietnam, Indonesia and other countries. Compare Wise, Revolut, and more.
